title: Admissions 2026 open for UG and PG Programmes at School of Criminal Law and Military Law: Apply Now!
description: Rashtriya Raksha University (RRU), an Institution of National Importance (INI), under the aegis of Ministry of Home Affairs, Government of India is a National Security and Police University of India.The School of Criminal Law and Military Law (SCLML) is a premier institution in the field of Criminal and National Security Laws.Courses Offered at SCLML5-Year Integrated B.B.A LL.B (Hons.)
